#  [Apache Flink 1.1.3 Released](</2016/10/12/apache-flink-1.1.3-released/>)

October 12, 2016 -

The Apache Flink community released the next bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.1. series.

We recommend all users to upgrade to Flink 1.1.3.


    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-java</artifactId>
      <version>1.1.3</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-streaming-java_2.10</artifactId>
      <version>1.1.3</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-clients_2.10</artifactId>
      <version>1.1.3</version>
    </dependency>


You can find the binaries on the updated [Downloads page](<http://flink.apache.org/downloads.html>).

##  Note for RocksDB Backend Users #

It is highly recommended to use the “fully async” mode for the RocksDB state backend. The “fully async” mode will most likely allow you to easily upgrade to Flink 1.2 (via [savepoints](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.1/apis/streaming/savepoints.html>)) when it is released. The “semi async” mode will no longer be supported by Flink 1.2.


    RocksDBStateBackend backend = new RocksDBStateBackend("...");
    backend.enableFullyAsyncSnapshots();


##  Release Notes - Flink - Version 1.1.3 #

##  Bug

  * [[FLINK-2662](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-2662>)] - CompilerException: "Bug: Plan generation for Unions picked a ship strategy between binary plan operators."
  * [[FLINK-4311](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4311>)] - TableInputFormat fails when reused on next split
  * [[FLINK-4329](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4329>)] - Fix Streaming File Source Timestamps/Watermarks Handling
  * [[FLINK-4485](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4485>)] - Finished jobs in yarn session fill /tmp filesystem
  * [[FLINK-4513](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4513>)] - Kafka connector documentation refers to Flink 1.1-SNAPSHOT
  * [[FLINK-4514](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4514>)] - ExpiredIteratorException in Kinesis Consumer on long catch-ups to head of stream
  * [[FLINK-4540](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4540>)] - Detached job execution may prevent cluster shutdown
  * [[FLINK-4544](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4544>)] - TaskManager metrics are vulnerable to custom JMX bean installation
  * [[FLINK-4566](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4566>)] - ProducerFailedException does not properly preserve Exception causes
  * [[FLINK-4588](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4588>)] - Fix Merging of Covering Window in MergingWindowSet
  * [[FLINK-4589](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4589>)] - Fix Merging of Covering Window in MergingWindowSet
  * [[FLINK-4616](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4616>)] - Kafka consumer doesn't store last emmited watermarks per partition in state
  * [[FLINK-4618](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4618>)] - FlinkKafkaConsumer09 should start from the next record on startup from offsets in Kafka
  * [[FLINK-4619](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4619>)] - JobManager does not answer to client when restore from savepoint fails
  * [[FLINK-4636](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4636>)] - AbstractCEPPatternOperator fails to restore state
  * [[FLINK-4640](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4640>)] - Serialization of the initialValue of a Fold on WindowedStream fails
  * [[FLINK-4651](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4651>)] - Re-register processing time timers at the WindowOperator upon recovery.
  * [[FLINK-4663](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4663>)] - Flink JDBCOutputFormat logs wrong WARN message
  * [[FLINK-4672](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4672>)] - TaskManager accidentally decorates Kill messages
  * [[FLINK-4677](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4677>)] - Jars with no job executions produces NullPointerException in ClusterClient
  * [[FLINK-4702](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4702>)] - Kafka consumer must commit offsets asynchronously
  * [[FLINK-4727](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4727>)] - Kafka 0.9 Consumer should also checkpoint auto retrieved offsets even when no data is read
  * [[FLINK-4732](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4732>)] - Maven junction plugin security threat
  * [[FLINK-4777](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4777>)] - ContinuousFileMonitoringFunction may throw IOException when files are moved
  * [[FLINK-4788](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4788>)] - State backend class cannot be loaded, because fully qualified name converted to lower-case

##  Improvement

  * [[FLINK-4396](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4396>)] - GraphiteReporter class not found at startup of jobmanager
  * [[FLINK-4574](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4574>)] - Strengthen fetch interval implementation in Kinesis consumer
  * [[FLINK-4723](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4723>)] - Unify behaviour of committed offsets to Kafka / ZK for Kafka 0.8 and 0.9 consumer
